tasks.label: setProxyForWSL
tasks.command: export HTTPS_PROXY="http://127.0.0.1:11809";  export HTTP_PROXY="http://127.0.0.1:11809";export ALL_PROXY="socks5://127.0.0.1:11808";git config --global http.proxy "socks5://127.0.0.1:11808";git config --global https.proxy "socks5://127.0.0.1:11808"; export HF_ENDPOINT=https://hf-mirror.com;
